title: Nice — Activities near Mas du Chanoine
description: Nice: discover this activity near our guesthouse on the French Riviera.
paragraphs: Nice, capital of the French Riviera awaits you a quarter of an hour from the Mas du Chanoine. This cosmopolitan city will allow you to stroll, to go shopping, to visit museums.
You can stroll on the very famous Promenade des Anglais and rest on its pretty sandy and pebble beaches, or organize your day according to a theme:
and many more according to your desires.
